# Stock Tracker

> A personal, manual stock journal that turns trades into clean P/L. Multi-broker ledger, FIFO realized P/L, RSI-aware positions, capital curves, win-rate breakdowns, and Shadow Trading for ideas you didn't act on.

Stock Tracker is a single-user web app for people who actively buy and sell stocks across multiple brokers and want reproducible profit/loss visibility — without broker sync, spreadsheets, taxes, or options bloat. Every trade is entered manually. Every P/L figure is auditable down to the FIFO lot match that produced it.

## Pillars

- **Multi-platform manual ledger.** Log every buy and sell across all your brokers in one place. One currency per platform.
- **Realized & unrealized P/L.** FIFO matching, deterministic, fully auditable. Persisted lot matches recompute incrementally when historical trades are edited.
- **Capital curves.** Cumulative P/L over 1M, 3M, 1Y, and all-time.
- **Wins & losses.** Win rate, P/L by symbol, recent trades, performance per day/week/month/year.
- **RSI badges everywhere.** The same RSI signal — Oversold, Near Oversold, Neutral, Near Overbought, Overbought — on the watchlist, open positions, and shadow cases.
- **Shadow Trading.** Capture a directional idea you didn't trade. Freeze the entry price + RSI + thesis. Review the outcome later.
- **Goals.** Monthly and yearly profit goals with live progress.
- **Mobile-ready.** Every page works on a phone.

## Pages

- `/` — Landing
- `/dashboard` — KPIs (Month P/L, All-time P/L), Goals, Cumulative P/L chart, Platforms Summary, Recent Trades, P/L by Symbol
- `/trades` — Trades log: All Actions / Buy / Sell tabs; sortable Date, Symbol, Platform, Type, Price, Qty, P/L
- `/positions` — Table + Heatmap views grouped by platform, with RSI badges
- `/performance` — Portfolio Growth chart; Daily / Weekly / Monthly / Yearly tabs; Realized P/L and Win Rate KPIs
- `/platforms` — Per-platform totals (invested, current value, realized, unrealized)
- `/symbols` — Watchlist with RSI badges, ticker-catalog search, RSI < 35 backtest over ~400 daily closes
- `/shadow` — Cases table (Open / Closed / Archived) with status badges, review drawer
- `/settings` — Goals editor and Capital Progress configuration

## Planned (next)

- **CSV / Excel import** of historical trades from any broker export, parsed and written through the same FIFO pipeline as manual entry.
- **Full export** to CSV — trades, platforms, symbols, and goals — so the user can hand it to an accountant or migrate to another tool.
- **Shadow Theses** grouping multiple cases under a single narrative.
- **Catalyst Calendar** for upcoming earnings and ex-dividend dates on tracked symbols.

## What's intentionally not here

- Automatic broker sync (live OAuth into broker accounts)
- Tax reporting — export your trade history and give it to your accountant
- Options, forex, crypto — stocks only
- Live charting — quotes and RSI only
- Multi-user collaboration — one portfolio, one person

## FAQ

**Does it sync with my broker?** No. Manual entry by design — it keeps the ledger auditable and broker-agnostic.

**How is P/L calculated?** FIFO (first-in, first-out). Every sell is matched against the oldest open buy lots for the same symbol and platform.

**What is Shadow Trading?** A feature for tracking ideas you didn't actually trade. You capture symbol, direction, entry price, and thesis. The system freezes that context so you can review honestly later.

**Where does RSI come from?** Computed from daily closes and cached per ticker. The same badge appears on watchlist, positions, and shadow cases.

**Is it free?** Yes. Sign in with Google.

## Tech

Next.js (App Router) · React · TypeScript · Tailwind · tRPC · Drizzle ORM · PostgreSQL · Better Auth · Recharts.
